form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Bendigo over 500m. Last start finished 4th over 500m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (27.91) behind Scott Sigma in a Special conditions race on April 5. Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Bendigo over 500m. Last start finished 4th over 500m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (27.91) behind Scott Sigma in a Special conditions race on April 5. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 2 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at Sandown three back. Makes plenty of appeal on best and can easily atone here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 2 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at Sandown three back. Makes plenty of appeal on best and can easily atone here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels approaching the first turn; Collided on the first turn.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a one length third (30.14) over 525m at this track. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a one length third (30.14) over 525m at this track. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 525m at this track in a handy (29.92), beating Paw Winkworth. Can keep things rolling.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 525m at this track in a handy (29.92), beating Paw Winkworth. Can keep things rolling.

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with four minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (34.88) at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need everything to go her way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with four minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (34.88) at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need everything to go her way.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Turned head outwards and marred turning into home straight.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by one length over 525m at this track (30.20). Looks a solid contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by one length over 525m at this track (30.20). Looks a solid contender.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (30.74) over 525m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (30.74) over 525m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 600m at this track. Better off looking to others.
